prestazioni: Engine swap to a naturally aspirated Alfa Romeo 1.7L Boxer engine (AS3000 engine code) with forged internals: Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (8.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from JE Pistons. Pair with a custom 4-2-1 stainless steel exhaust manifold by Janspeed Engineering and a 45mm twin-choke Weber IDF carburetor setup for optimized airflow.

Suspension overhaul using Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (DFV) with custom valving for the Alfasud’s MacPherson strut front and trailing arm rear setup. Replace bushings with polyurethane components from SuperPro (part numbers SPF0114K for front control arms and SPF0115K for rear trailing arms) to eliminate compliance.

Braking system upgrade featuring Brembo GT 4-piston calipers (08.5254.10) with 280mm vented rotors up front, paired with Ferodo DS2500 pads. Rear braking utilizes Brembo 1-piston calipers (08.9754.10) with 240mm solid rotors and Ferodo DS1.11 pads. Stainless steel braided brake lines from Goodridge (part number G-Stop SS2216) for pedal feel consistency.
estetica: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion using a custom Rocket Bunny-inspired kit (Alfasud-specific, not a generic kit) with extended front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a ducktail spoiler. Kit includes carbon fiber side skirts and a front splitter with integrated canards (designed by Prior Design for the Alfasud’s unique chassis).

OEM+ interior refresh with Recaro SRD-E bucket seats (Alfasud-specific mounting brackets) upholstered in Alcantara with red stitching. Replace the stock steering wheel with a Nardi Classic 350mm wood-rim wheel (part number 120.00.350) and add a custom aluminum shift knob from Italvolanti (part number IV-ALFA-SUD).

Exterior lighting upgrade to Hella Rallye 4000 Superwhite headlights (E-code, DOT-approved) with custom Cibie Oscar halogens for high-beam. Rear lighting converted to LED taillights from Dapper Lighting (part number DL-ALFA-SUD) with sequential turn signals. Add a custom aluminum fuel filler cap from Autodelta (part number AD-001) for period-correct aesthetics.
